cause_analysis.narrative: Divine Threading & Lash Studio - Anthem churned on 2026-03-28 after 298 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-03-30 via phone_call — -2 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. Median Zoca response time was 6.0 days, above the 24-hour expectation.
recommendations: [Retention] Implement a 'cancellation keyword' realtime alert to AMs + Growth team. Today this signal is discovered only post-churn.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
